titleStmt.title: SII 38.552: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 552. (A.R. No. 552 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravarttigaḷ Śrī Vīrarājēndrachōḻa Year: 6, Tula. śu. di. 13. Rēvathi, Wednesday = 21st October 1249 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of a Gaṇḍagōpalaṉ-pudumāḍai by a certain Kō-Viḻupparaiyaṉ Vīra-Chōḻaṉ, a native of Nandaṇambākkam, in order to burn a twilight lamp to the god at Tirunīrmalai at Surattūr-nāḍu in Kulottuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu alias Puliyūr-kōṭṭam, (a subdivision) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. Naimisai Pāṇḍavadūta-Bhaṭṭar Śrīdhara Bhaṭṭaṉ, a priest of the temple received the gift and agreed to maintain the lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ virarāceṉtira coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu vatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu
Irupattu muṉṟān tiyatiyāṉa trayodaśiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revatināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup pu
liyūrkkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanaṭṭuc curattūr nāṭṭu tirunirmalaināyanār nirvaṇṇaṉukku Immaṇṭalattu
ṭṭalaka ttūr nāṭṭu nantaṇapākkiḻāṉ koviḻupparaiyaṉ viracoḻaṉ I(n)ṉṉāyanāṟku vaitta cantiviḷakku Oṉṟu Ivviḷakkuk kum
Ikkoyil nampimāril nayimicai pāṇṭavatūtapaṭṭar [śrī]tarapaṭṭaṉeṉ kaikkoṇṭa kaṇṭakopālaṉputumāṭai 1 Immāṭai
yoṉṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittiruviḷakku cantirātittavarai celuttakaṭaveṉ pāṇṭavatūta paṭṭaṉ śrītara
paṭṭaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.552 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
